scene: Byte in teen form waits patiently at his desk during evening hours, the afternoon light transitioning to warmer evening tones

subjects.description: Byte as a gangly teen blob with big expressive eyes, smooth pixel contours, and elongated limbs
subjects.position: centered at desk in primary foreground
subjects.action: sitting in patient waiting posture, chin resting on hands, gazing hopefully toward the laptop screen with ecstatic expression

subjects.action: static environment anchor with laptop screen aglow

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette

mood: ecstatic yet patient, hopeful anticipation during evening wait
background: trophy shelf above desk with exactly one golden 10-day trophy on left side and one green plant friend on right side with clear spacing, food bowl on floor to right of desk
composition: Byte centered at desk, anchors visible, evening ambiance with Chicago skyline in soft focus through window
